generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures ambient temperature in building environments for real-time data acquisition"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Detects presence of people in specific zones for occupancy monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements from building sensors"
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy counts from sensor data"
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements from building sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy counts from sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls HVAC systems for temperature regulation based on digital twin commands"
]

instance LightingController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Adjusts lighting levels in response to occupancy and visual comfort data"
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "IoT connectivity platform for MQTT/AMQP sensor data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortAdjustmentService, NonVisualHealthManagementService, VisualizationService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital twin management platform for synchronization of physical and virtual systems"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortAdjustmentService, NonVisualHealthManagementService, VisualizationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization engine for interactive 3D building model rendering"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance BIMAuthoringTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Tools for creating and maintaining BIM models with geometric and functional data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMModel
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous monitoring of building operational parameters for immediate insights"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureInsight, OccupancyInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates building performance under various scenarios for optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergySimulationInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predicts future energy consumption and system behavior using machine learning"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionPredictionInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimizes energy usage through automated control strategies"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergySavingAction
]

instance VisualComfortAdjustmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Adjusts lighting and shading to maintain optimal visual comfort"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortAction
]

instance NonVisualHealthManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Manages non-visual health effects like circadian rhythm through lighting control"
    DTDFVocab:provides NonVisualHealthManagementAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building operations using Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance EnergySavingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of HVAC and lighting systems to reduce energy consumption"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualComfortAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of window shades and artificial lighting for optimal visual comfort"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance NonVisualHealthManagementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Regulation of lighting spectrum and intensity to support occupant circadian health"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TemperatureInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current temperature status for environmental monitoring"
]

instance OccupancyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy levels in building zones"
]

instance EnergySimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted energy usage from simulation models"
]

instance EnergyConsumptionPredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasted energy consumption trends using predictive analytics"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visual representation of building systems and data"
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-based model incorporating geometric, spatial, and functional building data, enriched with BCS component metadata and automated BIM-to-runtime transformations validated via ODTE metric"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMAuthoringTools
]

instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Unified virtual model of building infrastructure for real-time monitoring, simulation, and optimization of building operations"
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, OccupancySensor, HVACActuator, LightingController, EclipseHono, EclipseDitto, UnrealEngine5, BIMAuthoringTools
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the DT and transmitted via Eclipse Hono and Ditto to actuators and controllers for real-time adjustments to building systems."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization between physical assets and the Digital Twin; no explicit time intervals or specific rates mentioned in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Modular constellation comprising BIM as semantic backbone, Eclipse Hono/Ditto for data exchange, Unreal Engine for visualization, and service-oriented components with standardized extension points for integration."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers all life-cycle stages (design, construction, operation, refurbishment), with the DT primarily representing the 'as operated' phase through real-time data integration."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Evaluated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to assess accuracy, interoperability, and architectural soundness of the DT's representation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange via Eclipse Hono and Ditto; specific communication protocols not detailed in the document."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Standardized extension points for integrating with external systems (e.g., other DTs, enterprise systems), ensuring interoperability across AECO domains."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Leverages Building Information Modeling (BIM) as a semantic backbone; specific BIM standards (e.g., IFC) and communication protocols for Eclipse Hono/Ditto are not explicitly detailed in the document."
]
